post.description:
Create a new item.

- **name**: The name of the item.
- **price**: The price of the item.

get.description:
Retrieve an item by its ID.

- **item_id**: The ID of the item. Must be 1 or greater.
- **q**: Optional query string for searching. Max 50 characters.

schema.title: The ID of the item to get

get.description: Get info about the current authenticated user.

post.description:
Scrape a webpage at `input_url` and run the text through the LLM+template pipeline.
Returns a `job_id` that can be polled for status updates.

get.description: Poll the status of the web-scraping job by job_id.

Return a list of usage stats (per user + usage_type).
Includes the user's email & display name for better tracking.

AuthTokenPayload.title: AuthTokenPayload
AuthTokenPayload.description: Payload for auth token responses (login, register, refresh).

AuthTokenResponse.title: AuthTokenResponse
AuthTokenResponse.description: Wrapped response for auth token endpoints.

conversation_id.title: Conversation Id
conversation_id.description: Existing conversation to append to. If omitted, a new conversation is created.

preserve_context.title: Preserve Context
preserve_context.description: When false, a new conversation branch is created even if conversation_id is provided.

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional override for the generation model.

branch_from_id.title: Branch From Id
branch_from_id.description: Create a branched conversation that references this parent conversation ID.

follow_up_type.title: Follow Up Type
follow_up_type.description: Optional identifier for which quick action or suggestion was selected.

CsrfTokenResponse.title: CsrfTokenResponse
CsrfTokenResponse.description: Wrapped response for CSRF token endpoint.

ProcessingStage.title: ProcessingStage
ProcessingStage.description:
Detailed processing stages for progress reporting.

Each stage has a typical progress range:
- QUEUED: 0-5%
- DOWNLOADING: 5-20%
- CHUNKING: 20-30%
- TRANSCRIBING: 30-60%
- DIARIZING: 50-70% (overlaps with transcribing)
- GENERATING: 70-90%
- SAVING: 90-100%

password.title: Password
password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters long

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Total credits available in this plan

UserCredits.title: UserCredits
UserCredits.description: Summary of user's credit usage for the current billing period.
